spec.name: A Tall Dwelling
spec.description: This seems to be the tallest structure remaining in the city. At one time this could have been an inn of some sort, but now it is just a mess. The back wall as been completely knocked down revealing an entrance into another building through yet another collapsed wall. Between the two buildings are a few blast craters and boulders. An old set of wooden steps leads up to a creaking second floor.

west.description: A small side street winds past the dwelling.

up.description: The stairs and even the entire second floor itself looks very unsafe for travel. Gusts of wind make them creak and shudder.
